arabic:
وعنه أن رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم ، قال‏:‏ ‏
"‏ لا تناجشوا‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏متفق عليه‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

english.narrator: Abu Hurairah (May Allah be pleased with him) said:
english.text: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "Do not practise Najsh (to cheat).".

chapter.english: The Book of the Prohibited actions
